economic_notes: WIFN Development LP consolidated with 15% interest in two wind partnerships. Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation involved in wind energy projects. Tahgahoning Enterprises Inc. leases approximately 3,749 acres of land annually until June 2029. Bkejwanong Gas & Convenience Incorporated closed September 2023 subsequent to year-end. New corporation 1000440570 Ontario Ltd. incorporated February 2023 for economic development. Bkejwanong Trust holds $28M land settlement with $7M transferred. Wind farm distributions of $5,645,421 in 2022.
notes: Audit is qualified due to Bkejwanong Gas & Convenience Incorporated financials not being finalized for year ended March 31, 2022. Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Bkejwanong Gas & Convenience Inc, Three Fires Development Corporation, Tahgahoning Enterprises Inc, Walpole Algonac Ferry Ltd. WIFN Development LP and its subsidiaries fully consolidated as government partnership. Bkejwanong Gas closed September 2023 and $1,199,254 receivable written off subsequently. Wind farm distributions of $5,645,421 included in Operations and Maintenance revenue. Large increase in deferred revenue from $9.5M to $27.8M. Health and Social expenses include social assistance benefits of $5,166,029. Long-term debt includes $12,929,956 for government partnership wind projects. Remuneration schedule not included in provided financial statements. ISC funding calculated as sum of all ISC line items: Fixed $18,002,590 + Flexible $1,215,987 + Grant $807,445 + Set $202,041 = $20,227,063. Total government transfers includes ISC, Province of Ontario, Health Canada, HRSDC, CMHC, Other federal funding = $36,447,738. OSR = total revenue $48,292,689 minus government transfers $36,447,738 = $11,844,951.
